report: claims.test.ts: 8 passed (includes 'decodes multibyte UTF-8 claims as correct UTF-8, not Latin-1 mojibake' asserting name 'Gestão FXL' and workspaceName 'Café ☕'). token.test.ts: 8 passed (includes new test 'reads JWT expiry from a token carrying multibyte display claims'). type-check: tsc --noEmit clean. lint: eslint src/ clean, no output/errors. Decode path uses Uint8Array.from(atob(...), charCodeAt) + new TextDecoder().decode(bytes) then JSON.parse, not bare atob. claims.ts has zero imports (no import of token.ts); token.ts imports parseJwtPayload from claims.ts - no import cycle. readJwtExpiry still correctly extracts exp via claims.exp*1000.
summary: UTF-8 JWT decode fix verified: non-ASCII round-trip test passes, TextDecoder used, no import cycle, type-check and lint clean.
